category_sources: source_facts.description says it converts JSON and JSON Lines to terminal, CSV, HTTP, and markdown tables; official GitHub README describes jtbl as a CLI tool for printing JSON data as terminal tables.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is jtbl; official GitHub repository heading is kellyjonbrazil/jtbl and README title is jtbl.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains installation, usage, options, and JSON format sections; no separate docs site found.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository URL; GitHub page identifies kellyjonbrazil/jtbl as the public project repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description lists JSON/JSON Lines input and terminal, CSV, HTTP, and markdown table outputs; official README documents CLI usage and output options.
